name: NLP Cloud
tagline: Summarize text with hosted NLP models
description: Generate concise summaries from text using a selected NLP Cloud model through its model-scoped V1 REST API.

auth.hint: Create an NLP Cloud token and send it as Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>. The official API also accepts the Token scheme; Arthur MCP uses bearer for compatibility.

tools.name: summarize_text
tools.description: Summarize a block of text with a selected NLP Cloud model and return summary_text.

params.name: model_name
params.description: NLP Cloud model identifier that supports summarization.

params.name: text
params.description: Text to summarize, within the selected model's context limit.

params.name: size
params.description: Summary size: small or large; defaults to small and is not supported by every model.
